name: cx-raycast
title: cx
description: Browse and control Cmux layouts on Coder workspaces from Raycast.
author: brock

commands.name: list-workspaces
commands.title: List Workspaces
commands.subtitle: cx
commands.description: Browse Coder workspaces — activate layouts, start/stop, restart, update.

commands.name: open-workspace
commands.title: Open Workspace
commands.subtitle: cx
commands.description: Open a workspace app — Dashboard, web terminal, IDE, or per-template apps.

commands.name: menu-bar-status
commands.title: Workspace Status
commands.subtitle: cx
commands.description: Workspace status in the menu bar.

commands.name: up-from-template
commands.title: Up from Template
commands.subtitle: cx
commands.description: Bring up a layout from a template.

commands.name: find-layout
commands.title: Find Layout
commands.subtitle: cx
commands.description: Fuzzy-find a layout and activate it.
